questions.question: Consider the statement 'All students in a class are above 18 years old.', identify the quantifier used and state its application.
questions.hint: Identify the quantifier and explain its meaning.

questions.question: Simplify the following statement using quantifiers: 'There exists a number x such that 2x > 5 and 3x < 15'.
questions.hint: Use quantifiers to simplify the statement.

questions.question: Analyze the difference between universal quantifier (∀) and existential quantifier (∃). Provide an example for each.
questions.hint: Explain the difference between the two quantifiers with examples.
